Purple-Rushdown.name: Rushdown
Purple-Rushdown.description: Whenever you enter Wrath, draw 2 cards.

Purple-Sanctity.name: Sanctity
Purple-Sanctity.description: Gain 6 (9) Block. If the last card played this combat was a Skill, draw 2 cards.

Purple-Sands of Time.name: Sands of Time
Purple-Sands of Time.description: Retain. Deal 20 (26) damage. When Retained, lower its cost by 1 this combat.

Purple-Signature Move.name: Signature Move
Purple-Signature Move.description: Can only be played if this is the only Attack in your hand. Deal 30 (40) damage.

Purple-Simmering Fury.name: Simmering Fury
Purple-Simmering Fury.description: At the start of your next turn, enter Wrath and draw 2 (3) cards.

Purple-Study.name: Study
Purple-Study.description: At the end of your turn, shuffle an Insight into your draw pile.

Purple-Swivel.name: Swivel
Purple-Swivel.description: Gain 8 (11) Block. The next Attack you play costs 0.

Purple-Talk to the Hand.name: Talk to the Hand
Purple-Talk to the Hand.description: Deal 5 (7) damage. Whenever you attack this enemy, gain 2 (3) Block. Exhaust.

Purple-Tantrum.name: Tantrum
Purple-Tantrum.description: Deal 3 damage 3 (4) times. Enter Wrath. Shuffle this card into your draw pile.

Purple-Wallop.name: Wallop
Purple-Wallop.description: Deal 9 (12) damage. Gain Block equal to unblocked damage dealt.

Purple-Wave of the Hand.name: Wave of the Hand
Purple-Wave of the Hand.description: Whenever you gain Block this turn, apply 1 (2) Weak to ALL enemies.

Purple-Weave.name: Weave
Purple-Weave.description: Deal 4 (6) damage. Whenever you Scry, return this from the discard pile to your Hand.

Purple-Windmill Strike.name: Windmill Strike
Purple-Windmill Strike.description: Retain. Deal 7 (10) damage. When Retained, increase its damage by 4 (5) this combat.

Purple-Wreath of Flame.name: Wreath of Flame
Purple-Wreath of Flame.description: Your next Attack deals 5 (8) additional damage.

Purple-Alpha.name: Alpha
Purple-Alpha.description: Shuffle a Beta into your draw pile. Exhaust.
Purple-Alpha.descriptionUpgraded: Innate. Shuffle a Beta into your draw pile. Exhaust.

Purple-Blasphemy.name: Blasphemy
Purple-Blasphemy.description: Enter Divinity. Die next turn. Exhaust.
Purple-Blasphemy.descriptionUpgraded: Retain. Enter Divinity. Die next turn. Exhaust.

Purple-Brilliance.name: Brilliance
Purple-Brilliance.description: Deal 12 (16) damage. Deals additional damage equal to Mantra gained this combat.

Purple-Conjure Blade.name: Conjure Blade
Purple-Conjure Blade.description: Shuffle an Expunger into your draw pile. Exhaust.
Purple-Conjure Blade.descriptionUpgraded: Shuffle an Expunger with X+1 into your draw pile. Exhaust.

Purple-Deus Ex Machina.name: Deus Ex Machina
Purple-Deus Ex Machina.description: Unplayable. When you draw this card, add 2 (3) Miracles to your hand and Exhaust.

Purple-Deva Form.name: Deva Form
Purple-Deva Form.description: Ethereal. At the start of your turn, gain [W] and increase this gain by 1.
Purple-Deva Form.descriptionUpgraded: At the start of your turn, gain [W] and increase this gain by 1.

Purple-Devotion.name: Devotion
Purple-Devotion.description: At the start of your turn, gain 2 (3) Mantra.

Purple-Establishment.name: Establishment
Purple-Establishment.description: Whenever a card is Retained, reduce its cost by 1 this combat.
Purple-Establishment.descriptionUpgraded: Innate. Whenever a card is Retained, reduce its cost by 1 this combat.

Purple-Judgment.name: Judgment
Purple-Judgment.description: If the enemy has 30 (40) or less HP, set their HP to 0.

Purple-Lesson Learned.name: Lesson Learned
Purple-Lesson Learned.description: Deal 10 (13) damage. If Fatal, Upgrade a random card in your deck. Exhaust.

Purple-Master Reality.name: Master Reality
Purple-Master Reality.description: Whenever a card is created during combat, Upgrade it.

Purple-Omniscience.name: Omniscience
Purple-Omniscience.description: Choose a card in your draw pile. Play the chosen card twice and exhaust it. Exhaust.

Purple-Ragnarok.name: Ragnarok
Purple-Ragnarok.description: Deal 5 (6) damage to a random enemy 5 (6) times.

Purple-Scrawl.name: Scrawl
Purple-Scrawl.description: Draw cards until your hand is full. Exhaust.

Purple-Spirit Shield.name: Spirit Shield
Purple-Spirit Shield.description: Gain 3 (4) Block for each card in your hand.

Purple-Vault.name: Vault
Purple-Vault.description: Take an extra turn after this one. End your turn. Exhaust.

Purple-Wish.name: Wish
Purple-Wish.description: Choose one: Gain 6 (8) Plated Armor, 3 (4) Strength, or 25 (30) Gold. Exhaust.

Colorless-Dark Shackles.name: Dark Shackles
Colorless-Dark Shackles.description: Enemy loses 9 (15) Strength this turn. Exhaust.

Colorless-Deep Breath.name: Deep Breath
Colorless-Deep Breath.description: Shuffle your discard pile into your draw pile. Draw 1 card.
Colorless-Deep Breath.descriptionUpgraded: Shuffle your discard pile into your draw pile. Draw 2 cards.

Colorless-Discovery.name: Discovery
Colorless-Discovery.description: Choose 1 of 3 random cards to add into your hand. It costs 0 this turn. Exhaust.
Colorless-Discovery.descriptionUpgraded: Choose 1 of 3 random cards to add into your hand. It costs 0 this turn.

Colorless-Dramatic Entrance.name: Dramatic Entrance
Colorless-Dramatic Entrance.description: Innate. Deal 8 (12) damage to ALL enemies. Exhaust.

Colorless-Enlightenment.name: Enlightenment
Colorless-Enlightenment.description: Reduce the cost of all cards in your hand to 1 this turn.
Colorless-Enlightenment.descriptionUpgraded: Reduce the cost of all cards in your hand to 1 this combat.

Colorless-Forethought.name: Forethought
Colorless-Forethought.description: Put a card from your hand to the bottom of your draw pile. It costs 0 until played.
Colorless-Forethought.descriptionUpgraded: Put any number of cards from your hand to the bottom of your draw pile. They cost 0 until played.

Colorless-Impatience.name: Impatience
Colorless-Impatience.description: If you have no Attacks in your hand, draw 2 (3) cards.

Colorless-Jack of All Trades.name: Jack of All Trades
Colorless-Jack of All Trades.description: Add 1 random Colorless card into your hand. Exhaust.
Colorless-Jack of All Trades.descriptionUpgraded: Add 2 random Colorless cards into your hand. Exhaust.

Colorless-Madness.name: Madness
Colorless-Madness.description: Reduce the cost of a random card in your hand to 0 this combat. Exhaust.

Colorless-Mind Blast.name: Mind Blast
Colorless-Mind Blast.description: Innate. Deal damage equal to the number of cards in your draw pile.

Colorless-Panic Button.name: Panic Button
Colorless-Panic Button.description: Gain 30 (40) Block. You cannot gain Block from cards for 2 turns. Exhaust.

Colorless-Purity.name: Purity
Colorless-Purity.description: Exhaust up to 3 (5) cards in your hand. Exhaust.

Colorless-Apotheosis.name: Apotheosis
Colorless-Apotheosis.description: Upgrade ALL your cards for the rest of combat. Exhaust.

Colorless-Chrysalis.name: Chrysalis
Colorless-Chrysalis.description: Shuffle 3 (5) random Skills into your draw pile. They cost 0 this combat. Exhaust.

Colorless-Hand of Greed.name: Hand of Greed
Colorless-Hand of Greed.description: Deal 20 (25) damage. If Fatal, gain 20 (25) Gold.

Colorless-Magnetism.name: Magnetism
Colorless-Magnetism.description: At the start of your turn, add a random Colorless card into your hand.

Colorless-Mayhem.name: Mayhem
Colorless-Mayhem.description: At the start of your turn, play the top card of your draw pile.

Colorless-Metamorphosis.name: Metamorphosis
Colorless-Metamorphosis.description: Shuffle 3 (5) random Attacks into your draw pile. They cost 0 this combat. Exhaust.

Colorless-Panache.name: Panache
Colorless-Panache.description: Every time you play 5 cards in a single turn, deal 10 (14) damage to ALL enemies.

Colorless-Sadistic Nature.name: Sadistic Nature
Colorless-Sadistic Nature.description: Whenever you apply a debuff to an enemy, they take 5 (7) damage.

Colorless-Secret Technique.name: Secret Technique
Colorless-Secret Technique.description: Put a Skill from your draw pile into your hand. Exhaust.
Colorless-Secret Technique.descriptionUpgraded: Put a Skill from your draw pile into your hand.

Colorless-Secret Weapon.name: Secret Weapon
Colorless-Secret Weapon.description: Put an Attack from your draw pile into your hand. Exhaust.
Colorless-Secret Weapon.descriptionUpgraded: Put an Attack from your draw pile into your hand.

Colorless-The Bomb.name: The Bomb
Colorless-The Bomb.description: At the end of 3 turns, deal 40 (50) damage to ALL enemies.

Colorless-Thinking Ahead.name: Thinking Ahead
Colorless-Thinking Ahead.description: Draw 2 cards. Put a card from your hand on top of your draw pile. Exhaust.
Colorless-Thinking Ahead.descriptionUpgraded: Draw 2 cards. Put a card from your hand on top of your draw pile.

Colorless-Transmutation.name: Transmutation
Colorless-Transmutation.description: Add X random Colorless cards into your hand. They cost 0 this turn. Exhaust.
Colorless-Transmutation.descriptionUpgraded: Add X random Upgraded Colorless cards into your hand. They cost 0 this turn. Exhaust.

Colorless-Violence.name: Violence
Colorless-Violence.description: Put 3 (4) random Attacks from your draw pile into your hand. Exhaust.

Colorless-Beta.name: Beta
Colorless-Beta.description: Shuffle an Omega into your draw pile. Exhaust.

Colorless-Omega.name: Omega
Colorless-Omega.description: At the end of your turn, deal 50 (60) damage to ALL enemies.

Colorless-Ritual Dagger.name: Ritual Dagger
Colorless-Ritual Dagger.description: Deal 15 damage. If Fatal, permanently increase this card's damage by 3 (5). Exhaust.

Colorless-Decay.name: Decay
Colorless-Decay.description: Unplayable. At the end of your turn, take 2 damage.

Colorless-Doubt.name: Doubt
Colorless-Doubt.description: Unplayable. At the end of your turn, gain 1 Weak.

Colorless-Normality.name: Normality
Colorless-Normality.description: Unplayable. While in hand, you cannot play more than 3 cards this turn.

Colorless-Pain.name: Pain
Colorless-Pain.description: Unplayable. While in hand, lose 1 HP whenever you play another card.

Colorless-Parasite.name: Parasite
Colorless-Parasite.description: Unplayable. If transformed or removed from your deck, lose 3 Max HP.

Colorless-Regret.name: Regret
Colorless-Regret.description: Unplayable. At the end of your turn, lose HP equal to the number of cards in your hand.

Colorless-Shame.name: Shame
Colorless-Shame.description: Unplayable. At the end of your turn, gain 1 Frail.

Colorless-Ascender's Bane.name: Ascender's Bane
Colorless-Ascender's Bane.description: Unplayable. Ethereal. Cannot be removed from your deck.

Colorless-Curse of the Bell.name: Curse of the Bell
Colorless-Curse of the Bell.description: Unplayable. Cannot be removed from your deck.

Colorless-Necronomicurse.name: Necronomicurse
Colorless-Necronomicurse.description: Unplayable. There is no escape from this Curse.

Colorless-Pride.name: Pride
Colorless-Pride.description: Innate. At the end of your turn, put a copy of this card on top of your draw pile. Exhaust.

Colorless-Burn.name: Burn
Colorless-Burn.description: Unplayable. At the end of your turn, take 2 damage.

Colorless-Void.name: Void
Colorless-Void.description: Unplayable. Ethereal. Whenever this card is drawn, lose 1 Energy.
